parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response: 'error', error: $json.error || 'Ошибка валидации', action: $json.action || null }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO planner_users (username, password_hash) VALUES ($1, crypt($2, gen_salt('bf', 12))) RETURNING id, username, created_at::text
SELECT id, username FROM planner_users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER($1) AND password_hash = crypt($2, password_hash)

INSERT INTO planner_sessions (token, user_id, expires_at, remember) VALUES (encode(gen_random_bytes(32), 'hex'), $1, to_timestamp($2 / 1000.0), $3) RETURNING token, user_id, expires_at::text;
UPDATE planner_users SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;
DELETE FROM planner_sessions WHERE token = $1 RETURNING token

WITH upd AS (
  UPDATE planner_sessions SET last_used_at = NOW()
  WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW()
  RETURNING user_id
)
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username
FROM upd JOIN planner_users u ON u.id = upd.user_id;

UPDATE planner_users SET password_hash = crypt($3, gen_salt('bf', 12)), password_changed_at = NOW() WHERE id = (SELECT user_id FROM planner_sessions WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW()) AND password_hash = crypt($2, password_hash) RETURNING id, username
